'''jachumu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nib|nib]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-ch-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nib|nib]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| jachumu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:jæchimith|jæchimith]] || [[word:jæchimij|jæchimij]] || [[word:jæchimish|jæchimish]] || [[word:jæchimi|jæchimi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:jachuchumuth|jachuchumuth]] || [[word:jachuchumuj|jachuchumuj]] || [[word:jachuchumush|jachuchumush]] || [[word:jachuchumu|jachuchumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:jachumuth|jachumuth]] || [[word:jachumuj|jachumuj]] || [[word:jachumush|jachumush]] || [[word:jachumu|jachumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:jachufmuth|jachufmuth]] || [[word:jachufmuj|jachufmuj]] || [[word:jachufmush|jachufmush]] || [[word:jachufmuf|jachufmuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jachumuthu|jachumuthu]] || [[word:jachumuju|jachumuju]] || [[word:jachumushu|jachumushu]] || [[word:jachumuku|jachumuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jachumuth|jachumuth]] || [[word:jachumuj|jachumuj]] || [[word:jachumush|jachumush]] || [[word:jachumu|jachumu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jachumuthul|jachumuthul]] || [[word:jachumujul|jachumujul]] || [[word:jachumushul|jachumushul]] || [[word:jachumukul|jachumukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jachumuthuthu|jachumuthuthu]] || [[word:jachumujuju|jachumujuju]] || [[word:jachumushushu|jachumushushu]] || [[word:jachumuku|jachumuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jachumuthun|jachumuthun]] || [[word:jachumujun|jachumujun]] || [[word:jachumushun|jachumushun]] || [[word:jachumukun|jachumukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jachumuthuoro|jachumuthuoro]] || [[word:jachumujuoro|jachumujuoro]] || [[word:jachumushuoro|jachumushuoro]] || [[word:jachumukuoro|jachumukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
